title: [MTR4] CP 4000 Alfa Pendular Series
description: ResourcePack that adds the CP4000 series (Alfa Pendular) into Minecraft via Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR)
body:
# Overview
![Alfa](https://i.imgur.com/A4PDmet.png)
This resource pack is a recolor modification of the original ETR 470 resource pack, redesigned to resemble the Portuguese Alfa Pendular livery.

The base model represents the ETR 470, a tilting electric multiple unit originally developed in Italy for high-speed services.
In this version, the exterior has been visually adapted to match the distinctive styling of the Alfa Pendular, Portugal’s flagship high-speed train operated by Comboios de Portugal (CP).

### The recolor focuses on:
- Accurate color palette adjustments
- Portuguese-style branding layout
- Improved visual consistency with Iberian high-speed aesthetics

This pack is compatible with Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR) and maintains the original model structure while updating textures to reflect the Alfa Pendular appearance.

### Credits
- Original ETR 470 model and base resource pack: [ETR 470](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mtr-etr-470) (original author as listed on Modrinth)
- Recolor and texture adaptation: Vitor2005

## Disclaimer
This resource pack is a fan-made recolor and is not affiliated with or endorsed by Comboios de Portugal (CP), Alfa Pendular, the original ETR 470 creators, or the Minecraft Transit Railway mod.
All trademarks and brand names belong to their respective owners.
